name: ide
description: IDE bytecode disk library for the Workbench MVP. The artifact contains status, syntax, buffer, UI and disk/compile buffer helpers; stdlib deps resolve against the resident Workbench suite.

cases.name: ide-disk-persistence-status-messages
cases.expect: ("bad name" "duplicate name" "too large" "no space" "directory full" "disk invalid" "write/verify failed" "remount required" "saved; old space leaked" "product media is read-only" "persistence failed" "medium changed during write; check both disks")
